name: ecommerce-recomendations-with-ml
description: An e-commerce recommendation system with TensorFlow.js

scripts.chroma: cmd /c "docker stop chroma-hml 2>nul & docker rm chroma-hml 2>nul & docker run -d --name chroma-hml -p 8000:8000 -v chroma-data:/chroma/chroma chromadb/chroma"
scripts.dev: cmd /c "npx kill-port 3001 9229 2>nul" && concurrently -n CHROMA,BACKEND,FRONT -c yellow,cyan,green "npm run chroma" "npm run backend" "npm run start"
